content.query:
/*SELECT [createddate], [abbrevtype], [recordtype] ,[entity], [entitytitle] ,[memo], [trandisplayname], [foreigntotal]
 FROM [NET].[NetSuiteTransaction] left join [NET].[Entity] on NetSuiteTransaction.entity=Entity.id
 WHERE YEAR([createddate])=2022 and abbrevtype='BILLPMT'*/

SELECT [entityID] [VendorNumber], [entitytitle] [Vendor Name], COUNT(*) [Number of Payments], max(createddate) [Recent Payment Date]
 FROM [NET].[NetSuiteTransaction] left join [NET].[Entity] on NetSuiteTransaction.entity=Entity.id
 WHERE YEAR([createddate])>=2022 and abbrevtype IN ('BILLPMT')
 GROUP BY [entityID], [entitytitle]
